# Inthegra Software

> Oracle-native enterprise software company specializing in healthcare, credit/financial services, and retail ERP solutions. Founded in 2004, based in Argentina.

## Company Overview

Inthegra Software develops enterprise platforms built on Oracle technology for healthcare organizations, financial/credit institutions, and retail businesses across Latin America.

## Products

- [HealthCare Suite](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_healthcare.html): ERP for healthcare — prepaid medicine, social security, occupational health, home care. Clients include SIPSSA, EMI, Alta Salud.
- [Credit & Financial Suite](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_credit_financial.html): Platform for loans and credit card management. Clients include Elebar, Sucredito, La Zonal.
- [ERP for Retail & Services](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_erp.html): Business suite for retail, wholesale, and services with WMS, POS, ecommerce, and analytics modules.

## Oracle Services

- [Oracle Forms Modernization](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_modernizacion.html): Migration from Oracle Forms to Oracle APEX.
- [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_oci.html): Cloud migration and managed infrastructure.
- [Oracle Analytics Cloud (OAC)](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_oac.html): Business intelligence and analytics implementation.
- [Production AI](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_production_ai.html): AI integration for enterprise processes.
- [Custom Development](https://inthegrasoftware.com/landing_desarrollo_medida.html): Bespoke Oracle APEX application development.

## Solutions

- [CRM](https://inthegrasoftware.com/solutions_crm.html): Customer relationship management.
- [AI Chatbot](https://inthegrasoftware.com/solutions_ai_chatbot.html): Intelligent conversational assistants for enterprises.

- [Contact](https://inthegrasoftware.com/contacto.html): Contact form and information.
